items.title: Final: Storm 82, Sparks 64. Los Angeles shot 8-for-33 (24%) in the second half. They had 19 turnovers for the game. In truth, they looked like a rusty team coming off eight days off. Sparks are 8-11. They play on Wednesday at home against Indiana.

items.title: A handful of people asked why the big Nets-Hornets-Bulls-Wolves trade hasn't gone official yet...
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
A handful of people asked why the big Nets-Hornets-Bulls-Wolves trade hasn't gone official yet...

That deal will have to wait until July 9. Mouhamadou Gueye, who the Bulls are trading as part of the deal, isn't eligible to be traded until July 9 because he was signed on April 9.

items.title: Not to be overly downer, but I’m hesitant to overstate the accomplishments of the USMNT when their wins were Australia, Paraguay and Bosnia and Herzegovina, and their losses were Turkiye (already out) and Belgium (4-1, outclassed).

items.body_excerpt: Not to be overly downer, but I’m hesitant to overstate the accomplishments of the USMNT when their wins were Australia, Paraguay and Bosnia and Herzegovina, and their losses were Turkiye (already out) and Belgium (4-1, outclassed).

items.title: Giannis and Bam could be the foundation of the best switching defense of the decade.
items.author: Couper Moorhead
items.body_excerpt:
Giannis and Bam could be the foundation of the best switching defense of the decade.

There is overlap on offense, and that can take time to sort out, but Erik Spoelstra's most recent system may be a perfect fit to grease the wheels.

After The Buzzer: www.youtube.com/watch?v=XRW1...

media.title: One year out, what's shaping the 2027 FIFA World Cup so far? | The IX Soccer
media.description: The FIFA World Cup will be held in Brazil in 2027, and there are plenty of factors already contributing to how the tournament may go.
